name: I AM A ROBOT
short_description: A collection of various CAPTCHA questions, that are NOT solvable by human.　　This game is designed to use the help of various "ROBOTS".　　(Recommended ROBOT: Smartphone with internet)　　Can you fool the system to believe that you are NOT human?
detailed_description:
This game is designed to use the help of various "ROBOTS".

(Recommended ROBOT: Smartphone with internet)

Can you fool the system into believing that you are NOT human?

Game Play:

Follow the instructions in each question, sometimes by clicking, sometimes by typing,

and answer the questions correctly.

Can you select all squares showing blue?

Are you able to type a long text in 1 second?

Do you know how a DVORAK keyboard looks like?

If you don't know the answer, do not hesitate to help yourself.

Use a calculator, use the internet or use your smartphone camera.

Unless your able to read QR codes by yourself,

this game is designed NOT to be solvable without the help of "ROBOTS".

If you have the feeling, the way you're trying to get the answer is kinda cheating,

then it is probably one proper CORRECT way to clear this game.

If you are able to clear this game, without the help of any "ROBOTS"

...then you are probably NOT human!

FEATURES (after game cleared once):

  • CAPTCHA Question Selection

  • Endless Mode

  • No penalty retry time option

NOT RECOMMENDED WAY TO PLAY:

Playing the entire game only in ROBO language.

About Let's Plays and Streaming

Feel free to make let's play videos and/or streaming the game.

Please leave a link to the store page.
